instruction: Go to the second slide and name its title as "Online Shopping", same color with previous title.

evaluator.eval: compare_pptx_files(get_vm_file(env, config={'path': '/home/user/Desktop/189_4.pptx', 'dest': '189_4.pptx'}), expected=get_cloud_file(env, config={'path': 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/xlangai/ubuntu_osworld_file_cache/resolve/main/libreoffice_impress/b8adbc24-cef2-4b15-99d5-ecbe7ff445eb/189_4_Gold.pptx', 'dest': '189_4_Gold.pptx'}), rules={'examine_alignment': False, 'examine_font_name': False, 'examine_shape': False, 'examine_font_size': False})
